title: hieracium dovrense subsp. indutum
intro: Hieracium dovrense subsp. indutum, also known as Hieracium, is a flowering plant species belonging to the dandelion family (Asteraceae). It is a perennial plant with medicinal properties, particularly known for its potential anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including digestive problems, skin conditions, and respiratory infections, due to its health benefits such as antioxidant and immunomodulatory activities. Hieracium dovrense subsp. indutum can be prepared as an herbal tea, tincture, or infusion for medicinal purposes, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
